backend/main.mo: Main actor for the Mediatube backend implementing user profiles, video uploads, comments, subscriptions, playlists, community posts, API keys, and creator bank/withdrawal features with role-based access control.
backend/migration.mo: Defines OldActor and NewActor types for canister upgrades, migrating state by adding `creatorBankBalance` (initialized to 0) and `withdrawalRequests` (initialized to empty) fields.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features—the /withdrawal page and its sidebar/bottom-nav link—to their relevant source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated text file containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, used as build planning reference documentation.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React SPA, loading the Google Identity Services script and mounting the app at `#root`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes, including the new `/withdrawal` route rendering `WithdrawalPage`, wrapped in a `QueryClientProvider`.
frontend/src/components/AddToPlaylistBut: A button component that opens a popover allowing authenticated users to add or remove a video from their playlists, and create new playlists inline.
frontend/src/components/AdOverlay.tsx: Video ad overlay component with a 15-second countdown, a skip button that appears after 5 seconds, and auto-dismiss on completion.
frontend/src/components/BottomNav.tsx: A fixed mobile bottom navigation bar with links to Home, Shorts, Subscriptions, Withdrawal, and Profile, with multilingual label support.
frontend/src/components/CameraRecordingM: A full-featured camera recording modal supporting filters, zoom, music selection, duration options, and mic selection for recording short video clips.
Displays a list of comments for a video and provides an authenticated input form for submitting new comments.
frontend/src/components/CommunityPostCar: Renders a single community post card with author info, timestamp, optional image attachment, and a delete option for the post owner.
frontend/src/components/CommunityPostCom: A form component for authenticated users to compose and submit community posts with optional image attachments and upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/EditProfileModal: A modal dialog component that allows users to edit their channel profile (name, handle, description) with validation and submission via the useUpdateUserProfile hook.
frontend/src/components/FilterSelector.t: A horizontally scrollable filter selector component that renders filter buttons from a predefined list and highlights the currently selected filter.
frontend/src/components/LanguageSelector: A dropdown menu component that lets users switch the app language among seven supported languages using the LanguageContext.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main app layout component providing the navigation sidebar, top bar with search and voice search, user authentication controls, and multilingual label support.
frontend/src/components/MusicPickerPanel: A bottom sheet panel that displays a music library, allows previewing tracks via an Audio element, and lets users select or deselect a background music track.
frontend/src/components/NetworkStatusBan: A banner component that displays an offline warning or a temporary 'back online' message based on the current network status.
frontend/src/components/OfflineErrorStat: A full-page error state component shown when content cannot be loaded due to no internet connection, with a retry button.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog for first-time channel setup that collects a channel name, handle, and description, pre-filling fields from Google auth data when available.
frontend/src/components/RecommendedVideo: Renders a sidebar list of recommended videos (excluding the current one), each showing a thumbnail, duration overlay, channel name, view count, and upload time. Displays skeleton loaders while data is loading.
frontend/src/components/ReelCard.tsx: Full-screen reel card component that auto-plays/pauses a video based on active state, tracks progress, handles mute toggle, like animation, comments drawer, and subscribe action.
frontend/src/components/ReelCommentsDraw: Bottom-sheet drawer for viewing and posting comments on a reel, fetching existing comments with user avatars and supporting authenticated comment submission.
frontend/src/components/ShareButton.tsx: Button component that copies a video's shareable URL to the clipboard using the modern Clipboard API with a legacy execCommand fallback, showing a confirmation state on success.
Subscribe/unsubscribe toggle button for a channel that checks the current user's subscription status and calls the appropriate mutation, with loading and unauthenticated states.
frontend/src/components/TrendingVideos.t: Horizontally scrollable trending videos section showing the top 10 non-short videos with rank badges, duration overlays, view counts, and left/right scroll controls.
frontend/src/components/VideoCard.tsx: Renders a video card with thumbnail, duration badge, channel avatar, title, view count, and optional subscribe button, linking to the video or reels page.
frontend/src/components/VideoPlayer.tsx: Full-featured video player component with play/pause, volume, seek bar, chapters, fullscreen, playback rate settings, and an end-screen with recommended videos countdown.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Provides a React context for managing the app's current language, persisting the selection to localStorage and supporting seven language codes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using TanStack Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddComment.ts: Mutation hook that calls the backend to add a comment to a video and invalidates the comments query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddVideoToPlaylist: Mutation hook that adds a video to a playlist via the backend actor and invalidates related playlist queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminRemoveVideo.t: Mutation hook that calls adminRemoveVideo on the backend actor and refreshes admin dashboard and video list queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useCameraRecorder.ts: Custom hook that manages camera/microphone access, MediaRecorder lifecycle, audio device enumeration, facing mode switching, elapsed time tracking, and recorded blob output.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateApiKey.ts: Mutation hook that creates a new API key via the backend actor and invalidates the apiKeys query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateCommunityPos: Mutation hook that creates a community post with optional attachment via the backend actor and invalidates communityPosts on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreatePlaylist.ts: Mutation hook that creates a new playlist with a title and description via the backend actor and invalidates the playlists query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteCommunityPos: Mutation hook that deletes a community post by ID via the backend actor and invalidates community post queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeletePlaylist.ts: Mutation hook that deletes a playlist by ID via the backend actor and invalidates the playlists query on success.
Query hook that fetches the admin dashboard data from the backend, enabled only when the actor is ready and the user is authenticated.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetAllVideos.ts: Query hook that fetches all videos from the backend actor, refetching on window focus.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetApiKeys.ts: Query hook that fetches the authenticated user's API keys from the backend, enabled only when the actor and identity are available.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: Query hook that fetches the currently authenticated caller's user profile from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetChannelVideos.t: Query hook that fetches all videos for a given channel principal from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCommentCount.ts: React Query hook that fetches the comment count for a given video ID via the actor's `getCommentCount` method.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetComments.ts: React Query hook that fetches all comments for a given video ID using the actor's `getComments` method.
React Query hook that fetches all community posts and returns them sorted newest-first.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCommunityPostsB: React Query hook that fetches community posts for a specific channel principal, sorted newest-first.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCreatorBankAcco: React Query hook that fetches the authenticated creator's bank account state from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetMonetizationSta: React Query hook that fetches monetization statistics for the authenticated user via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetPlaylistById.ts: React Query hook that fetches a single playlist by its ID, returning null if unavailable.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetPlaylistsByOwne: React Query hook that fetches all playlists owned by the currently authenticated user.
React Query hook that fetches the list of video metadata for a given playlist ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetSubscribedReels: React Query hook that fetches short/reel videos from channels the authenticated user is subscribed to.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetSubscribers.ts: React Query hook that fetches the list of subscriber principals for a given channel principal.
React Query hook that fetches trending videos from the backend actor without refetching on window focus.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetUserProfile.ts: React Query hook that fetches a user profile for a given principal, returning null if unavailable.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetVideo.ts: React Query hook that fetches metadata for a single video by its ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useGoogleAuth.ts: Provides a Google Sign-In context and provider using the GSI client library, persisting the authenticated user to localStorage and exposing login/logout handlers.
frontend/src/hooks/useIncrementViewCount: React Query mutation hook that increments a video's view count and invalidates related video queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using `@dfinity/auth-client`, exposing login, logout, and identity state with idle handling disabled by default.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsCallerAdmin.ts: React Query hook that checks whether the currently authenticated caller has admin privileges via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useMusicMixer.ts: Hook that mixes a background music track with a video blob's audio using the Web Audio API's OfflineAudioContext, returning a WAV blob with progress tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useNetworkStatus.ts: Hook that tracks the browser's online/offline status by listening to window `online` and `offline` events.
frontend/src/hooks/useRemoveVideoFromPla: React Query mutation hook that removes a video from a playlist and invalidates related playlist queries on success.
React Query mutation hook that submits a withdrawal request for a given amount and shows contextual toast notifications on success or error.
frontend/src/hooks/useRevokeApiKey.ts: Mutation hook that revokes an API key via the actor, invalidates the 'apiKeys' query cache, and shows success/error toasts.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: Mutation hook that saves the caller's user profile via the actor and invalidates the 'currentUserProfile' query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSearchVideos.ts: Query hook that searches videos by a search term using the actor, only enabled when the actor is ready and the search term is non-empty.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetProfileImage.ts: Mutation hook that fetches the current profile and updates its avatar with new image bytes, then invalidates the profile cache and shows a toast.
frontend/src/hooks/useSubscribeToChannel: Exports two mutation hooks, useSubscribeToChannel and useUnsubscribeFromChannel, that call the actor to manage channel subscriptions and invalidate the relevant subscribers query.
Mutation hook that updates a user's profile (name, description, handle, avatar) via the actor and invalidates the 'currentUserProfile' query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useUploadVideo.ts: Mutation hook that reads a video file as bytes, wraps it in an ExternalBlob with optional progress tracking, and uploads it via the actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useVideoFilter.ts: Hook that provides a utility to apply CSS filters and zoom to a video element by rendering it onto a canvas and capturing the result as a MediaStream.
frontend/src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts: Hook that wraps the Web Speech API to provide voice-to-text search functionality, exposing listening state, transcript, and error handling.
frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts: Defines a multilingual translation map keyed by language code, containing UI string translations for the Mediatube and Photo app.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind, defines CSS custom properties for the dark YouTube-style theme and Mediatube brand tokens, and adds utility classes for scrollbar hiding and brand gradients.
frontend/src/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the Vite app, loading the Google Sign-In script and mounting the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page that displays platform statistics, user list, and video list with the ability to remove videos, accessible only to authenticated admins.
frontend/src/pages/ApiKeysPage.tsx: Page for managing API keys, allowing authenticated users to create, view, copy, and revoke their API keys.
frontend/src/pages/ChannelPage.tsx: Channel profile page that displays a user's videos, playlists, community posts, and subscriber count, with subscribe functionality.
frontend/src/pages/CommunityPage.tsx: Community feed page that shows all community posts with a composer for creating new posts and handles offline/loading states.
frontend/src/pages/CopyrightPolicyPage.t: Static page displaying Mediatube's copyright policy, including content ownership rules and the DMCA takedown process.
frontend/src/pages/DownloadAppPage.tsx: Marketing page for downloading the Mediatube mobile app, featuring app screenshots, key features, and download buttons for Android and iOS.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Displays a filterable video grid with category chips, loading skeletons, and offline error handling using fetched video data.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Renders a login page supporting email/password (stub), Google OAuth, and Internet Identity sign-in, with a profile setup modal for new Google users.
frontend/src/pages/MonetizationPage.tsx: Shows an authenticated user's monetization dashboard with earnings stats cards, loading skeletons, and error/refresh handling.
frontend/src/pages/PlaylistDetailPage.ts: Displays a single playlist's videos with thumbnail previews, and allows the playlist owner to remove videos or delete the playlist.
frontend/src/pages/PlaylistsPage.tsx: Lists the authenticated user's playlists in a grid and provides a dialog to create new playlists with a title and description.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Shows the authenticated user's channel profile with avatar upload, subscriber/video counts, and an edit profile modal; redirects unauthenticated users to login.
frontend/src/pages/ReelsPage.tsx: Displays a TikTok-style vertical reels feed with 'For You' and 'Following' tabs, using IntersectionObserver to track the active reel and handling authentication/offline states.
frontend/src/pages/SearchResultsPage.tsx: Renders search results for a query from URL params as a responsive video grid, with loading skeletons and offline/empty state handling.
frontend/src/pages/ShortsPage.tsx: Displays a grid of short videos filtered from all videos, with loading skeletons and offline/empty state handling.
frontend/src/pages/SignupPage.tsx: Sign-up page supporting Internet Identity and Google OAuth flows, with a profile setup modal for new Google users and a placeholder email/password form.
frontend/src/pages/SubscriptionsPage.tsx: Shows a grid of videos from subscribed channels for authenticated users, fetching subscription data via the backend actor with offline and empty state handling.
frontend/src/pages/UploadVideoPage.tsx: Video upload form supporting file selection, camera recording, optional background music mixing, and short-video toggle, with upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/pages/VideoPlayerPage.tsx: React page that displays a video player with metadata, uploader info, chapters parsed from description, comments, recommended videos, and theatre mode toggle. Handles loading/offline states and increments view count on load.
frontend/src/pages/WithdrawalPage.tsx: React page for creators to view their USD balance, submit withdrawal requests, and see a transaction history table with status badges. Handles unauthenticated and offline states.
frontend/src/types/filters.ts: Defines TypeScript types and a configuration map for seven CSS-based video/photo filters (normal, beauty, vivid, b&w, warm, cool, vintage) including display names, CSS filter strings, and icons.
frontend/src/types/music.ts: Defines the MusicTrack interface and a static MUSIC_LIBRARY array of five royalty-free background music tracks with metadata and asset URLs.
frontend/src/utils/avatarHelpers.ts: Provides two utilities: converting a Uint8Array image blob to a base64 data URL with MIME-type detection, and generating two-letter initials from a display name.
frontend/src/utils/formatters.ts: Exports three formatting helpers: formatViewCount (abbreviates numbers to K/M), formatTimeAgo (converts nanosecond timestamps to relative strings), and formatDuration (seconds to HH:MM:SS).
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom brand color tokens (YouTube-style and Mediatube), border radii, fonts, glow shadows, and fade/accordion animations, plus the animate and typography plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest for Mediatube tracking schema version, existing implemented features (withdrawal page and sidebar nav link), and pending feature requests for a creator dollar bank account backend.
